Hi, I'm David 👋
About Me

Meet David

I'm a Graphic Designer passionate about helping brands stand out in crowded spaces.

From social media creatives to event flyers, church designs, business promotions, and branding materials, I create visuals that don't just look good—they communicate effectively.

My goal is simple: Turn ideas into visuals that people remember.

Featured Projects

Selected Work

ASA For Governor — Campaign Series

ObjectiveBuild consistent, recognizable campaign branding for a gubernatorial candidate across flyers and billboards.
ChallengeNeeded a bold, trustworthy visual identity that worked at both flyer and billboard scale.
SolutionBuilt a consistent party-color system and strong portrait treatment that carried across every touchpoint.

Business & Career Services — Flyer Variations

ObjectivePromote a church's multi-week business and career series featuring six guest speakers.
ChallengeNeeded to organize six speaker headshots and program details without the design feeling cluttered.
SolutionUsed a bold color-blocked grid for the speaker panel and high-contrast typography to keep the hierarchy clear.

University & College Admission Flyers

ObjectiveDrive admission applications for two Ilorin-based institutions: a private university and a college of health technology.
ChallengeNeeded to communicate programs, entry requirements, and contact details while staying visually credible.
SolutionPaired strong photography with clean institutional layouts and accreditation badges to build trust.

SwiftBolt Brand Identity

ObjectiveBuild a complete visual identity for a ride-hailing and delivery startup, from logo to social presence.
ChallengeNeeded a mark and color system that felt modern and trustworthy across app, vehicle branding, and merchandise.
SolutionDesigned a dynamic logomark with a bold blue palette, applied consistently across the app icon, social pages, and branded apparel.

Brand Promotions Across Industries

ObjectiveDeliver distinct, on-brand promotional designs for three very different clients: a wedding videographer, a jewelry brand, and a community initiative.
ChallengeEach brand needed its own tone — romantic and premium, luxurious and bold, energetic and youthful — without losing visual polish.
SolutionTailored color, typography, and imagery to each brand's personality while keeping a consistently clean, professional finish across all three.

Frequently Asked Questions

Got Questions? I've Got Answers.

Every project includes 2-3 rounds of revisions to refine the design until it matches your vision. Additional rounds beyond that are available at a small added cost.
You'll get high-resolution JPG and PNG files ready for print or social media, plus a PDF for printing where needed. Editable source files (PSD/AI) are available on request.
Most single flyers or social media graphics are delivered within 24-48 hours. Larger projects like full brand identities typically take 5-7 business days, depending on scope and revisions.
Yes — church flyers, conference graphics, and event promotions are some of my most frequent projects. I understand the tone and visual language that resonates with congregations.
Absolutely. Rush turnaround is available for an additional fee — just let me know your deadline when you reach out and I'll confirm if same-day or next-day delivery is possible.
A flyer is a single design for one event or promotion. A brand identity package goes deeper — it includes your logo, color palette, typography, and a consistent visual system you can reuse across flyers, social media, and other materials so everything looks like it belongs to the same brand.
Message me on WhatsApp with a short brief — what the design is for, any text or details to include, and your deadline. I'll confirm scope and pricing, and we begin as soon as that's agreed.
